name: Aged Garlic Extract
summary: Aged garlic extract reduces systolic and diastolic blood pressure in hypertensive patients.
description: Aged garlic extract reduces systolic and diastolic blood pressure in hypertensive patients.
safetyNotes: A specific aged garlic extract was relatively well tolerated in a small 12-week trial of closely monitored warfarin users, without excess serious hemorrhage. This does not establish safety for every garlic formulation, anticoagulant, dose, surgery context, pregnancy, or long-term use.
